title: Cathie Wood’s ARK buys another 220K Circle shares despite sell-off
summary: Cathie Wood’s ARK Invest added $13.9 million worth of Circle shares on Tuesday, extending its July buying spree to 725,517 shares amid a steep stock decline.

title: Stripe, Advent offer $53B to acquire PayPal: Report
summary: Stripe and Advent reportedly offered to buy PayPal for $53 billion, at a 28% premium compared to the company’s Tuesday closing price.

title: The Bitcoin Softfork That Tried to Police “Junk Data” — And Why It’s Already Failing
summary:
Bitcoin Magazine

The Bitcoin Softfork That Tried to Police “Junk Data” — And Why It’s Already Failing
Bitcoin’s real power is that anyone willing to pay fees can write to the ledger. BIP-110’s backers want to change that for data-heavy transactions. The backlash reveals what’s truly at stake.

title: US, UK Outline Recommendations to Align Stablecoin and Tokenization Rules
summary: The joint recommendations back cross-border stablecoins and tokenized markets, setting a shared direction while avoiding binding rules.

title: DeepMind CEO Says AGI Will Be Bigger Than Electricity or Fire
summary: Demis Hassabis says artificial general intelligence is only a few years away and proposes a new U.S. standards body to test frontier AI models before release.

title: US Treasury freezes over $130 million tied to Iran-linked crypto wallets
summary: Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent says OFAC sanctioned multiple Iran-linked crypto wallets, freezing over $130 million.

title: South Korea to bring crypto under new state asset management law
summary: The Ministry of Finance and Economy said it will establish the 'National Asset Basic Act' to update the government's asset management system.

title: China’s economy grows at one of lowest rates in decades
summary: Second-quarter GDP figure falls below annual target range as economic pressure mounts

title: The global minerals arms race
summary: Beijing’s export controls on rare earths and other niche metals are distorting markets and fuelling resource nationalism

title: Why the huge premium on SK Hynix’s U.S. listing may prove short-lived.
summary: If the Korean depository allows conversion, then the ADR premium on SK Hynix may contract.

title: Stripe and Advent reportedly team up to bid for battered PayPal. Michael Burry says the offer isn’t enough.
summary: PayPal, the struggling payments processor, rallied in premarket trade on Wednesday on a report that rival Stripe is teaming up with private-equity group Advent International on a bid.
